metadata.title:
GREAT fRObEMS BEFORE LABOR


IN BIG CONVENTION At TORONTO

pages.raw_text:
Gonpers, Mitchell and Morrison
have been pronounced guilty of
contempt of court, to the highest
judicial tribunal. This was the de-
cisiDn of the Denver convention of
the American Federation of Labor
a year ago, and will be the deci-
sion at Toronto.


The action OF the court of ap-
peals last week in affirming Judge
Wright's sentence has stirred the
whole labor world into action. If
the labOrites lose in the United
States supreme court they will ap-
peal to the country-in fact, they
are doing so now-and the powers
claimed by the judiciary may be
forced to the front as a dominant
political issue.


AS in previous conventions, the
political question is sure to play a
leading part. Up to two years ago
